mapper.sql: from wrong_question wq left join question q on q.id = wq.question_id left join paper p on p.id = wq.paper_id
mapper.select:
select wq.id, wq.user_id as userId, wq.question_id as questionId, wq.paper_id as paperId, wq.attempt_id as attemptId, wq.last_user_answer as lastUserAnswer, wq.wrong_count as wrongCount, wq.mastered, wq.mastered_at as masteredAt, wq.last_wrong_at as lastWrongAt, wq.created_at as createdAt, wq.updated_at as updatedAt,
q.type, q.content, q.options, q.answer, q.explanation, q.tags, q.difficulty,
p.title as paperTitle
order by wq.mastered asc, wq.last_wrong_at desc, wq.id desc limit #{request.pageSize} offset #{offset}

select wq.id, wq.user_id as userId, wq.question_id as questionId, wq.paper_id as paperId, wq.attempt_id as attemptId, wq.last_user_answer as lastUserAnswer, wq.wrong_count as wrongCount, wq.mastered, wq.mastered_at as masteredAt, wq.last_wrong_at as lastWrongAt, wq.created_at as createdAt, wq.updated_at as updatedAt,
q.type, q.content, q.options, q.answer, q.explanation, q.tags, q.difficulty,
p.title as paperTitle from wrong_question wq left join question q on q.id = wq.question_id left join paper p on p.id = wq.paper_id where wq.user_id = #{userId} and wq.id = #{id} limit 1

select t.tag as tag, count(*) as wrongCount, sum(case when wq.mastered = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as masteredCount from wrong_question wq left join question q on q.id = wq.question_id join json_table( case when q.tags is null or q.tags = '' then json_array() when json_valid(q.tags) then cast(q.tags as json) else json_array(q.tags) end, '$[*]' columns (tag varchar(64) path '$') ) t where wq.user_id = #{userId} group by t.tag order by wrongCount desc
